title: Analytics - Firmware Update Started
scenario: DFU start event does not populate device-specific fields (Device PID, Charge Unit PID, Update Type, Target Language ID) in Firebase analytics dashboard
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
3. Go to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Firmware Update (DFU).
4. Initiate a firmware update (DFU) process on the connected device.
5. Open the Firebase Analytics console for the Poly Studio Mobile app.
6. Verify that the analytics page displays default elements: graph, events in the last 30 minutes, event count by country/gender, events per session, app version, app build, and app environment.
7. Check that device-specific fields are also present: Device PID, Charge Unit PID, Update Type, and Target Language ID.
8. Wait a few hours after the DFU process completes.
9. Return to the Firebase Analytics console and check the event count for the related elements (e.g., DFU start, DFU success/failure events).
expected: The Firebase Analytics page displays all default elements (graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country/gender, events per session, app version, app build, app environment) and device-specific fields (Device PID, Charge Unit PID, Update Type, Target Language ID). After a few hours, the event count for DFU-related elements increases.
